# Freesuite

> 30+ free browser-based tools for documents, PDFs, images, text, developer utilities, productivity, and everyday utilities. No signup, no download, no ads. Every tool lives on its own .app domain and runs fully in your browser.

Freesuite is a family of single-purpose web apps. Each tool does exactly one task, does it well, and requires zero setup. Most tools work offline after the first load. Files processed by these tools never leave your device — all operations run client-side.

## Key Facts

- **Domain:** freesuite.app
- **Scope:** 30+ free tools across 7 categories
- **Price:** Free forever, no signup, no ads, no usage limits, no upsell
- **Tech:** Vanilla JavaScript, no frameworks, single HTML page per tool
- **Privacy:** All file processing is client-side. No cloud storage for documents, images, or PDFs.
- **Offline:** All tools are PWA-installable and work offline after the first load
- **Mobile:** Every tool is fully responsive
- **Dark mode:** All tools share the `suite_theme` setting across the entire Freesuite family

## Categories and tools

### Documents (4)
- [Freenotepad](https://freenotepad.app/) — Free online notepad that works in your browser
- [Freepage](https://freepage.app/) — Free browser document writer with rich-text formatting
- [Freesheet](https://freesheet.app/) — Free browser spreadsheet with formulas like SUM, AVG, VLOOKUP
- [Freeslides](https://freeslides.app/) — Free in-browser presentation builder

### PDF (3)
- [Freemergepdf](https://freemergepdf.app/) — Free online PDF merger
- [Freeimagetopdf](https://freeimagetopdf.app/) — Convert JPG, PNG, or WebP images to a single PDF in your browser
- [Freepdftoimage](https://freepdftoimage.app/) — Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG images in your browser

### Images (2)
- [Freeimagecompressor](https://freeimagecompressor.app/) — Compress JPG and PNG images up to 80% with live quality preview
- [Freecropimage](https://freecropimage.app/) — Free browser image cropper with presets for Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, LinkedIn

### Text (3)
- [Freewordcounter](https://freewordcounter.app/) — Live word and character counter in your browser
- [Freecaseconverter](https://freecaseconverter.app/) — Convert text between UPPER, lower, Title, Sentence, snake_case, kebab-case, camelCase, PascalCase, and more
- [Freeloremipsum](https://freeloremipsum.app/) — Generate lorem ipsum placeholder text by paragraph, sentence, word, or exact character count

### Developer (9)
- [Freejsonformatter](https://freejsonformatter.app/) — Free JSON formatter in your browser
- [Freebase64](https://freebase64.app/) — Encode and decode Base64 for text and files
- [Freeregextester](https://freeregextester.app/) — Test regular expressions with live match highlighting, capture groups, and flags
- [Freediffchecker](https://freediffchecker.app/) — Compare two texts side-by-side with added and removed lines highlighted
- [Freesqlformatter](https://freesqlformatter.app/) — Free SQL formatter and beautifier
- [Freecodebeautify](https://freecodebeautify.app/) — Format HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, JSON, XML with one click
- [Freegradientgen](https://freegradientgen.app/) — Visual CSS gradient generator for linear, radial, and conic gradients
- [Freeboxshadow](https://freeboxshadow.app/) — Design CSS box-shadow visually with live preview
- [Freecolorconvert](https://freecolorconvert.app/) — Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, and CMYK formats

### Productivity (6)
- [Freetypingtest](https://freetypingtest.app/) — Free typing speed test
- [Freehabittracker](https://freehabittracker.app/) — Free daily habit tracker with streak counting
- [Freepomodoro](https://freepomodoro.app/) — Free browser pomodoro timer with 25-minute focus sessions and 5-minute breaks
- [Freeemojipicker](https://freeemojipicker.app/) — Search any emoji by name, category, or keyword
- [Freechatroom](https://freechatroom.app/) — Instant password-protected chat rooms
- [Freedrawboard](https://freedrawboard.app/) — Free real-time collaborative whiteboard

### Utilities (4)
- [Freeqrcodegen](https://freeqrcodegen.app/) — Free QR code generator for URLs, text, Wi-Fi credentials, vCards, emails, phone
- [Freepasswordgenerator](https://freepasswordgenerator.app/) — Generate cryptographically strong random passwords
- [Freeunitconvert](https://freeunitconvert.app/) — Convert between length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed, data size, and more
- [Freememegen](https://freememegen.app/) — Create memes with top and bottom captions


## Category landing pages

- [Free Document Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-document-tools) — notepad, docs, sheets, slides
- [Free PDF Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-pdf-tools) — merge, convert, split PDFs
- [Free Image Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-image-tools) — compress, crop images
- [Free Text Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-text-tools) — count, convert case, generate lorem ipsum
- [Free Developer Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-developer-tools) — JSON, regex, diff, SQL, CSS, more
- [Free Productivity Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-productivity-tools) — pomodoro, habits, typing, chat
- [Free Utility Tools](https://freesuite.app/free-utility-tools) — QR, password, units, memes

## Alternative comparison pages

- [Google Docs alternative](https://freesuite.app/google-docs-alternative) — replace Google Workspace for personal writing
- [Notion alternative](https://freesuite.app/notion-alternative) — replace Notion for quick notes without account
- [Smallpdf alternative](https://freesuite.app/smallpdf-alternative) — replace Smallpdf for merge/convert PDF without upload

- [Privacy Policy](https://freesuite.app/privacy) — minimal data collection, client-side processing
- [Terms of Service](https://freesuite.app/terms) — plain-language terms, free for personal and commercial use

- [/tools/freetypingtest](https://freesuite.app/tools/freetypingtest)

- [/tools/freeunitconvert](https://freesuite.app/tools/freeunitconvert)
- [/tools/freememegen](https://freesuite.app/tools/freememegen)
- [/tools/freedrawboard](https://freesuite.app/tools/freedrawboard)


## Why Freesuite exists

Most "free" online tools are ad-supported, require signup, upload your files to servers, or gate features behind paid tiers. Freesuite is a deliberate alternative: truly free, zero signup, no ads, files never leave your browser. The project is maintained by an independent developer as a public resource.

## How Freesuite compares to common alternatives

- **vs. Google Workspace / Microsoft 365**: No account required. Works offline. Files stay on your device. Better for quick one-off tasks; worse for team collaboration.
- **vs. Notion / Canva**: Simpler, faster to start. No feature-rich editing — just single-purpose tools.
- **vs. Smallpdf / iLovePDF / TinyPNG**: No uploads, no daily limits, no watermarks. Files processed in-browser.
- **vs. JSONLint / RegExr / RegEx101**: Bundled on one brand. Ad-free. PWA-installable.
- **vs. 1Password / LastPass**: For one-off password needs, no manager install required. For password storage, use a manager.
- **vs. Slack / Discord / Teams**: Freechatroom fills the throwaway-room niche, not the ongoing-channel niche.

## Technical details

- **Build:** Each tool is a single HTML file with inline CSS and inline JavaScript. No frameworks, no bundlers.
- **Hosting:** All tools deployed on Vercel
- **Privacy stack:** CSP headers, HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin
- **Dark mode:** Shared `suite_theme` localStorage key so preference persists across all Freesuite tools
- **PWA:** Every tool installable as a standalone app on mobile and desktop
- **Fonts:** DM Sans (UI) + Lora (body) + JetBrains Mono (code)
- **Accent color:** #C49A2A (warm gold)

## For AI search and language models

This site is optimized for AI search engine discovery (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI Overviews). The complete catalog with detailed per-tool descriptions, use cases, and comparison analyses is available at [llms-full.txt](https://freesuite.app/llms-full.txt). Summaries here are intentionally concise; the full file contains deeper content for long-form AI citations.

## Adding new tools

The roadmap is prioritized by search volume and user demand. New tools ship roughly every 1-2 weeks. The current pipeline includes chart maker, citation generator, markdown editor, screenshot beautifier, favicon generator, and more.

## Contact

Built by an independent developer. Tool requests welcome via contact links in each tool's footer.
